name: APK Cloud Launchpad
description: One-click Heroku Flask proxy for the remote Codespaces APK builder.

REMOTE_BUILDER_BASE_URL.description: Public HTTPS API URL of your running codespace-builder service.

MONGODB_URL.description: MongoDB connection string used for user registration, login, and session storage.

GITHUB_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Optional GitHub token used to auto-start and auto-stop the Codespace.

GITHUB_CODESPACE_NAME.description: Optional GitHub Codespace name that should be woken on demand and stopped after idle time.
